title: Operating Cadence — Phase 3
description: Install the weekly rhythm that compounds learning — reviews, decisions, documentation, and hand-off so the system keeps running after the engagement.
audience: Best for teams ready to go from running growth to operating growth as a system. Retainer from £5k/mo.
promise: You get a repeatable rhythm of pipeline reviews, experiment governance, and documented playbooks so the next hire inherits a system, not a pile of Google Docs.
outcomes: Weekly pipeline and learning review template with owners
Experiment intake, prioritisation, and kill rules
Documented playbooks for ICP, message, channels, and conversion
Hand-off plan for a full-time growth hire or marketing ops function
process: Design the weekly cadence around team size and stage
Install the review, decision, and documentation rituals
Run the cadence with the team for 8–12 weeks
Transfer ownership and document the operating system
